name: Dandy’s block (Party!)
description:
You get invited to a party at double d’s crib! And when you get there! It’s a fucking wreck..

Creators note!:Hey guys! I know I haven’t been posting in a goodddd!- uhm.. I think 3

months? Sorry I was gone! I took a break off the web and came back for some reason and I got interested in dandys block again so yeah bye (also this can get freaky!) too too lil man pebble coal shanks and crash ain’t at the crib😞 Made on Saturday Dec 27 at 10:52 pm
